subject: reading
activity_templates: A 1st-grade sight words worksheet. Header reads 'Sight Words Practice'. A 4x3 grid of cute cartoon boxes, each containing a common sight word (the, and, said, have, from, they, this, what, were, your, when, there). {{character}} is in the corner holding a book.

A trace-and-write sight word worksheet. One target sight word at the top in large dotted form for tracing, then three blank lines for the child to write it themselves. A silly cartoon sentence using the word appears in a speech bubble from {{character}}.

A find-the-sight-word worksheet: a short kid-friendly sentence printed five times, each with one blank. A word bank of sight words at the bottom. Child fills each blank using the correct sight word. {{character}} is reading alongside.

A sight-word coloring worksheet: a cartoon scene divided into areas labeled with sight words. A color-key at the top ('the = red, and = blue...') tells the child how to color each area. {{character}} is in the scene.
